nonBlockingIssues.description: useToast hook was changed from throwing when outside ToastProvider to silently falling back to console.warn. This prevents test crashes but could mask real errors if a component is ever rendered outside the provider in production.
No test was added for the new purchasePrice > 0 validation in POST /api/user/owned-assets. The validation is correctly implemented but lacks dedicated test coverage.
No test exercises the $transaction with ownedAssetId path in POST /api/user/listings, which is the primary race condition prevention scenario.
String-based error matching in catch blocks for transaction errors is fragile; custom error classes would be more robust.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Testing & Validation Guidance: 'When modifying existing UI components or replacing UI behavior, workers MUST update all existing component tests that assert on the changed behavior. Run the full test suite after implementation and fix any test regressions before completing the feature.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature pseudo-transaction-flows replaced the simple Purchase confirmation dialog with a multi-step PurchaseFlowModal but did not update 3 pre-existing component tests. This required a dedicated fix feature (fix-broken-purchase-tests-and-quality) to resolve the test failures.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to UX Guidance: 'Use the project Toast component (components/ui/Toast) for user-facing error messages. Do not use browser alert() in production components.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: PurchaseFlowModal.tsx and ListingEntryModal.tsx both originally used alert() for error feedback. The fix feature replaced these with the Toast component. Documenting this convention prevents recurrence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Data Modeling Guidance: 'When adding validation to API routes, always add corresponding test cases that exercise the validation boundaries (e.g., invalid values returning 400).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix feature added purchasePrice > 0 validation to POST /api/user/owned-assets but did not add a test for it. The $transaction wrapping in listings route also lacks a test for the ownedAssetId path.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skipped agent-browser verification for the fix feature
rejectedObservations.reason: Justified - this was a test fix + minor code quality feature. Browser verification would not have revealed any additional issues since all changes were in test files, API route validation, and internal component error handling.

rejectedObservations.observation: The useToast fallback behavior change is a project-wide contract change that should be documented
rejectedObservations.reason: Already captured as a non-blocking issue and the tradeoff is reasonable since ToastProvider wraps the entire app in LayoutWrapper.tsx. Documenting hook fallback conventions is too granular for AGENTS.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: String-based error matching pattern needs convention guidance in AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a pre-existing pattern, not introduced by the fix. Too granular for project-level guidance; would be better addressed in a future refactoring milestone if the pattern becomes widespread.
